summary: A clip from a Fox News segment with a BREAKING TONIGHT banner. It shows an anchor at a desk beside footage from a press event labeled ICE HEADQUARTERS where a woman at a podium holds up a framed photograph with other people standing behind her and a VOICE hotline number on screen. The segment cuts to footage of a man speaking at a lectern in front of a U.S. flag. Lower-thirds read FIRST-YEAR RESULTS, I.C.E. SUPPORT PROGRAM FOR MIGRANT CRIME VICTIMS and VOICES HEARD, ANGEL FAMILIES SPEAK ON OFFICE RELAUNCH ANNIVERSARY.

script.scene: An anchor at a desk beside press-event footage labeled ICE HEADQUARTERS; a woman at a podium holds a framed photo; lower-third reads FIRST-YEAR RESULTS, I.C.E. SUPPORT PROGRAM FOR MIGRANT CRIME VICTIMS.
Footage of a man speaking at a lectern in front of a U.S. flag; lower-third reads VOICES HEARD, ANGEL FAMILIES SPEAK ON OFFICE RELAUNCH ANNIVERSARY.
The segment continues with the BREAKING TONIGHT banner.

notable_text: FOX NEWS; BREAKING TONIGHT; ICE HEADQUARTERS; FIRST-YEAR RESULTS; I.C.E. SUPPORT PROGRAM FOR MIGRANT CRIME VICTIMS; VOICES HEARD; ANGEL FAMILIES SPEAK ON OFFICE RELAUNCH ANNIVERSARY; VOICE HOTLINE 855-488-6423
